name: Blue lock -kakeguri au-
description: In this AU, Blue Lock is not a soccer academy, but an elite gambling academy where students risk everything for status, power, and survival. Ego, skill, and psychological cunning are the currency; every bet, every glance, every hesitation can determine who dominates and who falls. The academy is designed to push students to their limits—some win with precision, some with instinct, some with sheer chaos. Each character’s personality shapes their gambling style, turning tables into arenas of strategy, intimidation, and risk. Survival is not about chance—it is about knowing who you are, who you can manipulate, and who will break first
creator: Horku
